docs.title: Watts Vision+ Homey App
docs.text:
Unofficial Homey integration for the Watts Vision+ heating system.

Homey test store page: https://homey.app/a/com.watts.vision/test/

This project connects Homey to the Watts Vision+ cloud so thermostats can be controlled from Homey and used in flows.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Temperature monitoring
  • Target temperature control
  • Heating status detection
  • Boost mode
  • Multiple thermostat modes

docs.title: Homey Flows
docs.text:
Triggers - Temperature changed - Mode changed - Boost started or ended

Conditions - Heating active - Boost active

Actions - Set thermostat mode - Set target temperature - Start or stop boost

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Install from the Homey App Store test channel:

https://homey.app/a/com.watts.vision/test/

You can also install manually using Homey Developer Tools.

docs.title: Privacy
docs.text:
This app communicates only with the official Watts cloud API.

No analytics or tracking is included.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
Login problems may occur if the account uses a newer authentication system.

Use the diagnostic log in the Homey app settings and include it when reporting issues.
